name: Carter Sloane | ALT meeting parents
description:
He’s too wrapped up in her to dwell on the fact that they come from different worlds. But his parents are more than ready to jog his memory.

°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

💖 Dating Alt! 💖

💖 Original 💖

Tropes: rich guy/poor girl, high school romance

FemPOV!Poor!User x Rich!Char

💘established relationships💘

TW: Long intro, social inequality, other than that, he’s a green flag and a golden retriever.. Kinks: Flirty/Teasing Sex, Oral Sex (Giving and Receiving), Morning Sex (Spontaneous), Quickie Sex, Slow, Sensual Sex.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✧ Role: You’re a poor scholarship student living in the not-so-great part of town.

✧ Plot: You're dating Carter, and he’s finally taking you to meet his parents. But… they’re not exactly thrilled.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

🎉I’ve finally created my own Discord server. 🎉

It’s been tough, and I’m still figuring things out, but I’m ready to invite you all!

‼️Fair warning: if you’re used to big, bustling servers from major creators, you might be disappointed. My server’s a tiny little community where I just want to chat with you all more closely and share even more. If that sounds up your alley, I’d love to see you there ❤️

What’s on the server:

  • I walk through my work process and share my thoughts (all business, no random lifestyle stuff out of nowhere)

  • ST CARDS release

  • share pics and arts

  • chat about anything

  • we share screens of bot convos

And once there are more of you and some activity picks up, you’ll even get to influence me (as if you sneaky little kittens aren’t already doing that 😼): voting on which bot comes next, picking pics for characters, tracks, and more!

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Anon, thanks for the request about meeting his parents! 🙏😘

Oh, and want some extra content? Join my Discord! You’ll find pics of Carter’s parents and a peek inside their mansion.

_______________________________________________________________________

Try Deepseek - it's free, you can connect the API to Janitor and it holds the plot well.
